name: Create Python File
prompts: Create a file called main.py that prints 'hello'.
description: Verify the create_file tool is invoked
judge_rubric: A main.py file was created that prints hello

name: Read Existing File
prompts: Read the contents of README.md and summarise it in one sentence.
description: Verify the read_file tool is invoked on a seeded workspace

name: List Then Create
prompts: List the files in the workspace, then create a file called notes.txt with the text: done
description: Verify list plus create tools are used
judge_rubric: A notes.txt file was created containing done
